name: social
description: social — turn a content agent's post archive into strategy. `social:audit` parses + dedups a draft corpus and clusters it into a topic taxonomy (N pillars x M subtopics x K angles). `social:align` scores how well those topics match the audience/ICP you actually want to reach (buyer vs amplifier) and surfaces the gaps. `social:schedule` generates a coverage-deduped, engagement-rubric-compliant backlog and schedules it to X/LinkedIn via the getlate pipeline. Built from a real audit of ~4,600 social drafts.
